aifactinsight: New model with self-editing search capabilities, I think this will influence the upcoming models with better AI Search, retrieve, context management approach
practicalUsage: Complex reasoning tasks, code generation, and multi-turn conversations with improved context handling.

aifact: TurboQuant is an advanced, data-oblivious compression algorithm
aifactinsight: TurboQuant is meant to optimize the Key-Value (KV) cache, removing the main memory constraint during LLM inference
practicalUsage: Enables 4–6x longer context windows for LLMs on the same hardware and improves performance for vector databases
